activities_projects.title: Identifying Fundamental Rights
activities_projects.objective: Understand the different Fundamental Rights in the Indian Constitution
steps: List all Fundamental Rights mentioned in the Constitution
Write one example for each right
Prepare a simple chart showing these rights
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize and list Fundamental Rights

activities_projects.title: Rights in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Relate democratic rights to everyday life
steps: Find one news example where a democratic right is discussed
Write the right involved in the case
Explain how that right protects citizens
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect rights with real-life situations

activities_projects.title: Poster on Right to Equality
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of equality in society
steps: Draw a poster explaining Right to Equality
Include examples like equal treatment and abolition of untouchability
Display the poster in the classroom

activities_projects.title: Freedom of Speech Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand freedom of speech and expression
steps: Write a short paragraph expressing your opinion on a social issue
Discuss how freedom of speech allows people to express views
Share your opinion with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of free expression

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Democratic Rights
activities_projects.objective: Understand protection of rights through dramatization
steps: Divide students into small groups
Prepare a short role play showing violation of rights
Show how courts protect those rights
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how rights are protected in democracy

activities_projects.title: Right against Exploitation Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand issues like child labour and forced labour
steps: Collect news related to child labour
Discuss why such practices are illegal
Write two ways to prevent exploitation

activities_projects.title: Religious Freedom Chart
activities_projects.objective: Learn about freedom of religion in India
steps: List different religions practiced in India
Write how the Constitution protects religious freedom
Prepare a simple chart

activities_projects.title: Cultural Diversity Activity
steps: List languages spoken in your state
Explain why minorities need cultural protection
Write a short note on cultural rights

activities_projects.title: Court and Rights Activity
steps: Learn how citizens can approach courts for justice
Write the role of Supreme Court and High Courts
Explain why this right is called the 'heart and soul' of the Constitution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand legal protection of rights

activities_projects.title: Rights Awareness Campaign
steps: Prepare small awareness posters about rights
Explain one right to classmates
Display posters in school notice board
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students spread awareness about democratic rights
